Treant Staff  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 35
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 130
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Root (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 18
WT: 9.5 Size: LARGE
Class: ALL except BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Paladins can't use either
▲ Page top
...
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2004 at 4:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592343673941
161 posts
I have a 35 mage on Mith-Marr and well, Mages do not get any real croud control other then pets, and agro juggling. Well, sometimes pets die. I understand I dont want to be tanking, but it could be usefull. Not to mention, I could fight with another pet, like Air, and use the stuff to help minimize the amount of problems.

not to mention this is a decently low ratio for training 2HB... its by far not the best, but heck, under 40 is nice.

Edited, Sat Jun 12 17:52:57 2004
▲ Page top
Mage root thingie...
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2007 at 11:47 AM Rating: Decent
vashra
Scholar
316 posts
If you gear up your mage to be using this weapon with the idea that you *need* the root to go off, be sure you adjust the rest of your gear so that you have a snowball's chance in Hades of actually getting the weapon to proc.
____________________________

I have no idea if this is still true or not, but as of Dec. 2004 this item was Beastlord usable- the only BST usable item that has root on it (that's unlimited charges).

Treant Staff
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2003 at 4:01 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753350506
2 posts
I already have this item on my lvl 26 Mage, but for some reason the root ability on it will not work with my mage. So why allow the mage the ability to equip an item like this if it wont work for the mage class? I have tried to use it in direct battle also, and nothing, I still have to use the earth pet if I want to root anything.
▲ Page top
RE: Treant Staff
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2003 at 6:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254866196
30 posts
as with many items it may not proc till about lvl 35.



Edited, Tue Jan 21 17:47:05 2003
▲ Page top
RE: Treant Staff
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2003 at 7:55 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759101810
View User Forum
131 posts
The proc effect on all items depends on your DEX. If your DEX is low, very very few procs, if DEX is high, it procs all the time. I have a 52 shaman and can buff my dex up to 200+, my proc items do their jobh all the time. When my DEX is low, no procs.

The level of 18 for the proc on this item is correct.
▲ Page top
great weapon concept
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2002 at 7:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780483161
4 posts
currently i am using frostgiant femur while i still have to melee during solo but i would use this if i could keep my dex up enough to use when my root breaks and i gotta try to root again. for now though the frostgiant femur procs yaulp 2 at level one. 2hb 25 46 5 ac barb oggie troll vah all with ogre shm symbol quest this gives you yaulp 1 till you proc the femur. just my 2 cents

sorry if did not focus primarily on the treant staff)
Ogre shm
Shantak

# Sep 21 2002 at 12:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781022812
2 posts
OK clearly these boards are for discussing the item and giving useful info on the mob(s) that drop the said item.. so please dont use silly messages about WTB.. or "if anyone on "blah blah blah" server has one send -joemama- a tell.. there are other boards for those purposes...USE them so that those of us who are actually looking for useful info can get it while we are here.. instead of scrolling through countless WTB messages..grrr

price
QuoteReply
# Jun 16 2001 at 3:20 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
no price posted for this so i thought i would put in my info. i ran headlong into grizzknot in SK today and took him out. he dropped the bark and this staff. i shouted into the zone for a price check and someone said 1200 (which i doubted) so i continued on to the rathe mountains and shouted that i was selling it and someone make an offer. i gave the stats out to the guy and he offered me 400 so i sold it to him. seemed a fair price for me since i looted it off of a greenie.

Finneus Fulk
Bertoxx

proc

# Jun 12 2001 at 11:56 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
My shaman started using this at 18, and it proced fine. Im my oppinion, not useful for a mage, as it dosent proc often enough, and as is 2HB, you cant carry your stein.
